nodes.title: Compose protocol prompt zones
nodes.description: ensure_prompt_builder_on_path then import prompt_builder.build_zones from vendored benchmark; merge line_hint into user text when present. Failure: FileNotFoundError if submodule missing.

nodes.title: Transcribe with configured LLM provider
nodes.description: Dispatch to anthropic, openai, or gemini adapter with image_path, system, user_text, model override. Success: raw model string. Failure: provider API or ValueError for unknown provider.

nodes.title: Persist transcription YAML artifact
nodes.description: strip_yaml_fence; write artifacts/<job_id>/<image_stem>_transcription.yaml; optional yaml.safe_load safe_dump. Failure: invalid YAML content adds error string.

nodes.title: Validate transcript YAML against protocol schema
nodes.description: validate_transcript_file using vendored validate_schema; collect errors and warnings. Success: val_ok. Failure: schema errors appended to pipeline result.
